label: Deep Research
description: Question-first structured investigation with evidence, analysis, and synthesis.
success_criteria: Produces a synthesized answer grounded in >= 3 pieces of evidence.
author: system

states.name: question
states.label: Frame the Question
states.guidance: Write 3-5 sharp sub-questions that would decisively answer the goal. Save them under working_state['sub_questions'] as a list of strings.

states.name: hypothesize
states.label: Form a Hypothesis
states.guidance: State a falsifiable hypothesis (>= 30 chars) under working_state['hypothesis'] that your sub_questions will test.

states.name: gather
states.label: Gather Evidence
states.guidance: Collect >= 3 distinct pieces of evidence. Append each as an object {source, claim, strength} to working_state['evidence'].

states.name: analyze
states.label: Analyze
states.guidance: Compare evidence against hypothesis. Write an analysis of >= 120 chars under working_state['analysis'] describing which sub-questions are answered and which remain open.

states.name: synthesize
states.label: Synthesize Answer
states.guidance: Produce a final answer (>= 200 chars) under working_state['answer'] and a confidence score 1-5 under working_state['confidence'].

states.name: reflect
states.label: Reflect + Store
states.guidance: Write working_state['reflection'] (>= 80 chars) — what surprised you, what would you investigate next, and persist the answer to memory.
